title: FinancialMarketTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of place where a trade was executed, a price was sourced from, an instrument is listed.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Primary Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a primary market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Secondary Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a secondary market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a third market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fourth Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a fourth market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Over The Counter
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is over the counter.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Stock Exchange
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a stock exchange.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fund
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a fund (transfer agent, fund itself, etc.).(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Local Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: The place is a local market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: InterBank
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specified type of market is inter bank market.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Counter
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specified type of market is counter market.(ISO20022)
